title: biscutella didyma subvar. ciliata
intro: Biscutella didyma subvar. ciliata, also known as the Alpine Penny Cress, is a flowering plant species within the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Biscutella didyma subvar. ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate various respiratory-related ailments.
